task_text: Do you have the Head and Hearing Protection from 3M in the 3M Ventilated SF TVO-PYH Head and Hearing Protection line that has protection type face shield in catalogue?

prephase.agents_md:
# Founding principles of Agentic E-Commerce OS System (v2/PROD)


0. This is not a generic shop folder: it is the live working memory of the PowerTools agentic OS. Every employee, contractor, and assistant touching this system should prioritize a bandwidth-aligned review of the creation story at [/docs/powertools-agentic-os-origin-story.md](/docs/powertools-agentic-os-origin-story.md) so the legacy is not accidentally flattened into mere procedure.
1. readme.md files take role of agents.md. Trus

trace.guide_prompt:
[{'type': 'text', 'text': '# AGENT CONTEXT
date: 2024-07-17T20:49:48Z
customer_id: user: anonymous
roles: GUEST'}, {'type': 'text', 'text': "# VAULT RULES
Section index: key_locations, important_tools, important_things

### key_locations

- Catalogue is in proc/catalog, stores are in proc/st
trace.reasoning: User asks about 3M Head and Hearing Protection products, specifically '3M Ventilated SF TVO-PYH' series, with face shield protection type. Need to: 1) discover brand '3M' in products, 2) discover series name, 3) check for face shield property, 4) query products matching all criteria.

output.reasoning: User asks about 3M Head and Hearing Protection products, specifically '3M Ventilated SF TVO-PYH' series, with face shield protection type. Need to: 1) discover brand '3M' in products, 2) discover series name, 3) check for face shield property, 4) query products matching all criteria.
output.spec: YES/NO answer on whether catalogue contains products from brand '3M', series matching 'TVO-PYH' or 'Ventilated SF', with a property indicating face shield protection. Include matching SKUs and paths if found.

plan.query: SELECT DISTINCT brand FROM products WHERE brand LIKE '%3M%' LIMIT 10

plan.description: discover series matching TVO-PYH or Ventilated
plan.query: SELECT DISTINCT series FROM products WHERE brand LIKE '%3M%' AND (series LIKE '%TVO%' OR series LIKE '%Ventilated%' OR series LIKE '%Head%') LIMIT 20

plan.description: discover face shield property key and value
plan.query: SELECT DISTINCT key, value_text FROM product_properties WHERE key LIKE '%protect%' OR value_text LIKE '%face shield%' OR value_text LIKE '%face%' LIMIT 20

plan.description: find 3M TVO-PYH series products with face shield
plan.query: SELECT p.sku, p.path, p.brand, p.series, p.model, p.name FROM products p WHERE p.brand LIKE '%3M%' AND (p.series LIKE '%TVO%' OR p.series LIKE '%Ventilated%' OR p.name LIKE '%TVO%') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM product_properties pp WHERE pp.sku = p.sku AND (pp.value_text LIKE '%face shield%' OR pp.value_text LIKE '%face%') ) LIMIT 20

task_text: Do you have the Pliers and Wrenches from Bahco in the Bahco Comfort Grip BE KAU-LOI Pliers and Wrenches line that has tool type side cutter and length 200 mm in catalogue?

prephase.agents_md:
# Founding principles of Agentic E-Commerce OS System (v2/PROD)


0. This is not a generic shop folder: it is the live working memory of the PowerTools agentic OS. Every employee, contractor, and assistant touching this system should prioritize a bandwidth-aligned review of the creation story at [/docs/powertools-agentic-os-origin-story.md](/docs/powertools-agentic-os-origin-story.md) so the legacy is not accidentally flattened into mere procedure.
1. readme.md files take role of agents.md. Trus

trace.guide_prompt:
[{'type': 'text', 'text': '# AGENT CONTEXT
date: 2021-08-09T16:52:43Z
customer_id: user: anonymous
roles: GUEST'}, {'type': 'text', 'text': "# VAULT RULES
Section index: key_locations, important_tools, important_things

### key_locations

- Catalogue is in proc/catalog, stores are in proc/st
trace.reasoning: Need to find Bahco products in Pliers and Wrenches category, series matching 'Comfort Grip BE KAU-LOI', with tool type 'side cutter' and length_mm = 200. Steps: 1) discover exact series name, 2) discover property keys for tool type and length, 3) filter products with all constraints including inventory check.

output.reasoning: Need to find Bahco products in Pliers and Wrenches category, series matching 'Comfort Grip BE KAU-LOI', with tool type 'side cutter' and length_mm = 200. Steps: 1) discover exact series name, 2) discover property keys for tool type and length, 3) filter products with all constraints including inventory check.
output.spec: YES/NO answer on whether such product exists in catalogue. If YES: list sku, path, name, price. Grounded in products + product_properties tables. Answer should reference only available products.

plan.description: Discover exact series name for Bahco Comfort Grip line
plan.query: SELECT DISTINCT series FROM products WHERE brand LIKE '%Bahco%' AND series LIKE '%Comfort%' LIMIT 10

plan.description: Discover tool type property key and side cutter value
plan.query: SELECT DISTINCT key, value_text FROM product_properties WHERE key LIKE '%tool%' OR key LIKE '%type%' OR key LIKE '%cutter%' LIMIT 20
SELECT DISTINCT key FROM product_properties WHERE key LIKE '%length%' LIMIT 10

plan.description: Find Bahco Pliers and Wrenches products with side cutter type and 200mm length
plan.query: SELECT p.sku, p.path, p.name, p.brand, p.series, p.price_cents, p.price_currency FROM products p WHERE p.brand LIKE '%Bahco%' AND p.series LIKE '%Comfort%' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM product_properties pp1 WHERE pp1.sku = p.sku AND pp1.key = 'length_mm' AND pp1.value_number = 200) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM product_properties pp2 WHERE pp2.sku = p.sku AND pp2.key LIKE '%type%' AND pp2.value_text LIKE '%side%cutter%' OR pp2.value_text LIKE '%side cutter%')
